items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — SecSuite  AI-powered Tool for OSINT Web and API Security Testing
id: 29657650-82c9-5362-bdca-4c32f3b766e0
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to SecSuite  AI-powered Tool for OSINT, Web and API Security Testing (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/SecSuite  AI-powered Tool for OSINT, Web and API Security Testing
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/15
modified: 2026/06/15
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — SecSuite  AI-powered Tool for OSINT, Web and API Security Testing — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-15T14:20:35Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "SecSuite  AI-powered Tool for OSINT, Web and API Security Testing", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX SecSuite  AI-powered Tool for OSINT, Web and API Security Testing Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9152293; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-15, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] Web Application Attack - moderate severity (Risk 6.79/10). EPSS 100.0% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1059, T1190, T1059.001 (3 techniques). 1 indicator detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-RAN. AI confidence: MODERATE (40%) - partial intelligence corroboration.
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) added Oracle PeopleSoft Enterprise PeopleTools flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-35273 (CVSS score of 9.8), to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog. items.title: CVE-2026-12198: A weakness has been identified in Microweber up to 2.0.20. This affects the function userfiles_path of the file /api_nos
items.description: A weakness has been identified in Microweber up to 2.0.20. This affects the function userfiles_path of the file /api_nosession/thumbnail_img of the component API Endpoint. Executing a manipulation of the argument cache_path_relative can lead to path traversal. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-12198 A weakness has been identified in Microweber up to 2020 This affe
id: 4ac8d54a-c6bb-503b-942b-bf859ba76e21
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-12198 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: PATHTRAVERSAL
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12198
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/15
modified: 2026/06/15
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-12198 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-15T14:20:35Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-12198", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-12198 Exploitation Attempt - PATHTRAVERSAL"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7488255; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-15, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
